facts.summary: Five hook scripts exist: docgen-common.mjs, docgen-guard-shell.mjs, docgen-guard-write-paths.mjs, docgen-session-context.mjs, docgen-validate-written-artifact.mjs.

Hooks are wired to Command Code events via install.mjs mergeGlobalSettings: SessionStart=session-context; PreToolUse write|edit=guard-write-paths; PreToolUse shell=guard-shell; PostToolUse write|edit=validate-written-artifact.
Exact enforcement logic inside each hook file was not read; README describes a write allowlist (docs/**, .docgen/**) and read-only shell guard, but the implementation is unverified here.
